narrative:
Reading 3-A (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,169 registered voters, with 59.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.0%, a modest Republican lean of 4.4 percentage points.
